summary: All features verified working correctly: 1) PhotoFind Kiosk displays properly without black screen, 2) Admin RDV list shows appointments, 3) Confirmed RDV shows admin actions (propose new date, cancel, delete), 4) DELETE /api/appointments/{id} endpoint works. Backend tests: 9/9 passed.

photofind_kiosk_display.notes: Kiosk page loads correctly showing event name 'Mariage Demo - Kiosque Test', pricing cards (5€/15€/35€), and Commencer button. No black screen.

kiosk_pricing_structure.notes: Format-based pricing (10x15, 13x18, etc.) with sans_cadre/avec_cadre options and email pricing all present

confirmed_rdv_actions.notes: When clicking confirmed RDV, shows detail panel with all action buttons: 'Proposer cette nouvelle date', 'Annuler le RDV', 'Supprimer'

cancel_appointment.notes: cancelAppointment function updates status to 'cancelled' with admin_response

delete_appointment.notes: deleteAppointment function successfully removes appointment. Backend returns 200 with success message.

critical_code_review_comments: Good: PhotoFindKiosk.js line 795 correctly uses 'event?.name' with optional chaining for safety
Good: AdminDashboard.js has cancelAppointment (line 1844) and deleteAppointment (line 1857) functions properly implemented
Good: Backend DELETE endpoint at line 5197 properly validates admin auth and deletes appointment from MongoDB
Good: UI shows appropriate action buttons for confirmed appointments with proper styling
seed_data_creation: Existing: Jean Dupont confirmed appointment (222faf27...), 2 pending appointments
context_for_next_testing_agent: PhotoFind Kiosk at /kiosk/test-kiosk-demo loads correctly. Admin appointment management in CALENDRIER tab shows all RDVs with proper status badges. Confirmed appointments display action buttons (propose new date, cancel, delete). DELETE endpoint at /api/appointments/{id} requires admin auth and works correctly.
